goal: Control which columns are loaded first (fast baseline), and which are loaded for optimization and detailed/item views across all datasets.

id_name.description: Fast lookup and identity verification only.

progression_table_visual.description: Columns needed for progression-table preview cards and grouped upgrade details.

optimization_core.description: Columns needed for stat parsing and ranking/optimization.

single_piece_visual.description: Columns needed for single-piece cards and sidebar details.

full_set_visual.description: Columns needed for full-set card rendering and stat totals.

detailed_item_view.description: General-purpose detailed item view profile for all datasets.

detailed_complete_set_view.description: General-purpose complete-set detailed view profile for all datasets.

shared_catalog_cards.description: Shared card/list rendering profile for non-optimizer catalog datasets.

shared_catalog_detail.description: Shared detail-inspector profile for non-optimizer catalog datasets.

shared_catalog_ranking.description: Shared ranking profile for non-optimizer catalog datasets when generic numeric sorting is enabled.

armors.notes: Armors rely on parsing damage negation/resistance into derived Dmg:/Res: columns.

talismans.notes: Talismans emphasize effect and concise metadata in detailed views.
